acquisition method: data-dependent acquisition mode using a top 10 method
cleavage agent: digested with endoproteinase LysC (1:400) for 12 h at 37 °C
collision energy: NCE of either 25% or 28% for unlabelled or TMT-labelled samples
enrichment method: further enriched with immobilised metal affinity chromatography (IMAC)
fractionation method: separated into 20 fractions by RP-HPLC at pH10
fragmentation method: fragmented by a hybrid collision-induced dissociation (CID) followed by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: with ‘heavy’ ATP on a Q-Exactive instrument
ionization type: via a nanoelectrospray ion source using a liquid junction
labeling: After labelling with TMT 6-plex reagents, to enable relative quantitation across the 6 samples
